title: dendrosenecio johnstonii subsp. adnivalis
intro: Dendrosenecio johnstonii subsp. adnivalis, also known as the giant mountain senecio, is a rare and unique succulent plant native to the high-altitude regions of Mount Kenya. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Dendrosenecio johnstonii subsp. adnivalis include its potential to treat various ailments, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, while also possessing antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tincture or infused in water to extract its medicinal compounds, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
